rulings.Case Title: HEATHER DANIELS VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC., et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 10, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC.,'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Meridian Foreclosure Services' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to comply with this Court's order of April 17, 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: HEATHER DANIELS VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 10, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIOAL TRUST COMPANY and ONEWEST BANK, FSB's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Defendants Deutsche Bank and Onewest Bank's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts re: successor liability and statute of limitations. See Alfaro v. Community Housing 171 Cal.App.4th 1356. Plaintiff's and Defendant's counsel are ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C respectively in future. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: FONG REAL ESTATE COMPANY, LLC VS. ELVA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 10, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFF FONG REAL ESTATE COMPANY, LLC's Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order. Plaintiff's Application for Right to Attach is OFF CALENDAR per moving party. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD LEW VS. GRAEME AGATE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Ot Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 10, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT GRAEME AGATE and ADAM CLEAR's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Defendants' Motion to Quash Service of Summons is OFF CALENDAR per moving party. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: PERRY CLOSE VS. JOSE PEREZ SR. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 10, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT JOSE PEREZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege in good faith (1) terms of operative contract between master tenant and sublessee referenced in Attachment 15 1:24 (or attach such contract); including (a) terms varying notice provision per Culver and applicability of Culver to approved residential sublease (Opposition 2:3-5); (b) terms providing for unambiguous forfeiture of the sublease at the termination of master lease per Northridge Hospital Foundation; and/or (2) service of Notice terminating sub tenancy and its expiration. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. =(501/AJR)
